DataRequest.Name: Heavy UDP Port Scan: Single Host / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects excessive UDP connections from the same source to many distinct ports on the same destination in a short period of time
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Heavy UDP Port Scan from $srcIpAddr to $destIpAddr

SubPattern.name: Filter1
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND ipProto=17 AND srcIpPort>=1024 AND srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_APP_ACCELOPS) AND srcIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND userGrp!="VPN Access"
